description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a robust rectangular frame upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, while the backrest is lined with four loose throw pillows—two in a solid orange color and two with a gray and white zebra stripe pattern. The armrests are wide, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a monolithic appearance. The legs are short, blocky, and barely visible, suggesting a low profile close to the ground. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings. The upholstery appears to have a subtle woven pattern, adding visual interest to the otherwise neutral color palette.
description: A modern, boxy gray sofa with wide armrests, two orange and two zebra-patterned throw pillows, and a textured fabric finish. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with a low profile and subtle woven upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, all four throw pillows, and the wide, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick armrest, the depth of the seat, and the profile of the throw pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous gray upholstered back and the tops of the throw pillows peeking above the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and pillow arrangement from the opposite side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and four loose back cushions (two orange, two zebra-patterned), all similarly sized and arranged in a single row along the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in gray fabric with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of metal or wood with a simple, functional design.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, fully upholstered, with loose cushions providing additional support and comfort.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured gray fabric with a subtle woven pattern on the main sofa, complemented by solid orange and zebra-striped patterned throw pillows.
